name: Edit Academic Article
description: Edit a previously written article: load existing text, identify sections to revise, parallel section rewriting, synthesis, DOCX output.

nodes.prompt: Ask the researcher to provide the article to edit (paste text, provide file path, or reference a previous run). Parse into sections.
Ask the researcher what to edit: which sections to revise, specific issues to fix (citations, tone, argument strength, structure), style concerns. Store edit instructions per section.

Spawn one section-writer agent PER EDITED SECTION (all in parallel). Each applies the full 7-skill pipeline on all paragraphs: draft with vectorless search, style compliance, grammar, academic language, purity, repetition, citation audit. Unchanged sections pass through as-is.

Spawn synthesizer agent. Review full article coherence after edits: argument flow across edited and unedited sections, transition consistency, intro/conclusion alignment with revised content, cross-section repetition check.
Generate updated .docx file with researcher's format preferences. Save to project directory.
